entry.title: New: Reso 24-174 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"REFERRING TO THE MAUI PLANNING COMMISSION A PROPOSED BILL TO AMEND ORDINANCE 3889 (2011), RELATING TO THE CHANGE IN ZONING (CONDITIONAL ZONING) FOR WEST MAUI PROJECT DISTRICT 5 (PULELEHUA) FOR PROPERTY SITUATED AT MAHINAHINA, KAHANA, LAHAINA, MAUI, HAWAIʻI"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
